title: cryptandra polyclada subsp. aequabilis
intro: Cryptandra polyclada subsp. aequabilis, also known as the cryptandra plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Epacridaceae, endemic to the tropical regions of Northern Australia. The cryptandra plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and skin infections. The plant's leaves and stems have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and bronchodilator properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to treat various health ailments, and it has also been used in modern herbal medicine, including in the form of capsules and extracts.
